events: Witch declares she'll kill the betrayer
Crusader uses Lie Detection on everyone
All guild masters pass Lie Detection test
Sword Saint suspects Crusader might be betrayer
Heretic Questioner kills 3 more hunters (8th, 9th, 10th place)
Sword Saint cuts off Heretic Questioner's arm
Kim Gong-ja takes command of situation
skills: Heretic Questioner's Holy Technique: Divine Body
deaths: 3 more hunters killed by Heretic Questioner
Sword Saint severs Heretic Questioner's right arm
cause_effect: Someone chose Devil King's reward but identity remains hidden
Heretic Questioner's preemptive killing is 'efficient' but brutal
Sword Saint's intervention stops further killing
Kim Gong-ja steps up as neutral leader
notes: Crusader reveals Heretic Questioner's past: killed all religious fighters when tower first opened. Kim Gong-ja uses his authority to stop the fighting.

events: Devil King of Fall Rain manifests
Red rain pours down on city
Devil King summons massive monster army
Quest 'Defense of the Empire's City' given
Difficulty A~SSS
Devil King is weakened from manifesting
deaths: Count dies from Devil King's sword attack
NPC soldiers and citizens terrified
cause_effect: Devil King's manifestation triggers 12th floor boss battle
Red rain is Devil King's signature ability
Count's death cuts off tower's connection to outside world
Quest failure means 13th floor won't open
notes: Count dies first, causing economic crisis. Kim Gong-ja realizes he needs to unite hunters and NPCs. Devil King's army is vastly larger than 11th floor.

events: Witch teleports Kim Gong-ja to city walls
Witch gives rousing speech to soldiers
Kim Gong-ja uses Holy Sword to stop red rain locally
Soldiers regain morale and prepare to fight
Kim Gong-ja plans to confront Devil King directly
cause_effect: Witch's speech + Holy Sword's light restores hope to soldiers
Devil King's red rain stopped where Holy Sword shines
Kim Gong-ja plans to use Witch's teleport to reach Devil King
Alliance between hunters and NPCs formed
notes: Witch reveals she's Ukrainian and learned speech techniques from communists. Kim Gong-ja starts to embody hero role. Devil King's army hesitates after seeing Holy Sword.

events: Devil King attacks with red sword trajectory
City walls break, buildings destroyed
Count confirmed dead from attack
Kim Gong-ja defends broken wall alone for 30 seconds
Sword Saint arrives and praises Kim Gong-ja
Kim Gong-ja and Sword Saint fight together
Kim Gong-ja levels up to D Class during battle
deaths: Count confirmed dead
Many soldiers killed in Devil King's attack
cause_effect: Kim Gong-ja's 30-second solo defense inspires soldiers
Sword Saint's arrival turns tide of battle
Kim Gong-ja levels up from combat experience
Hunters and NPCs unite against common enemy
notes: Kim Gong-ja's growth in real combat shown. Devil King's attack pattern revealed. Count's death has major economic implications.

events: Full battle against Devil King's army
Kim Gong-ja kills ogre and reaches D Class
Hunters unite: Sword Saint, Witch, Heretic Questioner, Venomous Snake, Crusader
Kim Gong-ja charges alone at Devil King
Devil King kills Kim Gong-ja
Kim Gong-ja copies Devil King's skills in death space
skills: Devil King's skills revealed for copying
deaths: Kim Gong-ja killed by Devil King's sword
Many monsters killed by hunters
loops: Kim Gong-ja dies and returns 24 hours before
Plans to use copied Devil King skills against him
cause_effect: Kim Gong-ja's charge was suicidal but allows skill copying
Dying to Devil King lets him copy Devil King's abilities
Returns to past to prepare better strategy
Sword Saint acknowledges Kim Gong-ja's bravery
notes: Kim Gong-ja shows growth in combat ability. Devil King's true power shown. Kim Gong-ja's willingness to die for strategy demonstrated.

events: Kim Gong-ja views Devil King's trauma penalty
Devil King's backstory revealed: Estelle, a saintess from rural village
Estelle could heal by swallowing diseases
Kings and religious leaders burned her village
Estelle consumed her village's remains and became Devil King
Kim Gong-ja returns 24 hours before
Kim Gong-ja shares 11th floor information with guilds
Kim Gong-ja meets Crusader to set up Sword Saint encounter
skills: Devil King's origin: Estelle's disease consumption ability
Hundred Ghosts Summon (SS) - copied from Devil King
deaths: Estelle's village burned (trauma)
Estelle consumed by her own shadow
Devil King's origin story
loops: Kim Gong-ja returns 24 hours before to prepare
Uses knowledge of future to change strategy
Plans to prevent guild conflict and Count's death
cause_effect: Devil King's trauma reveals she was once innocent healer
Human cruelty turned Estelle into monster
Kim Gong-ja uses knowledge to prevent future tragedies
Sets up meeting with Crusader to intercept Sword Saint
notes: Medium-level penalty: Hungry Ghost Road. Devil King's true name is Estelle. Kim Gong-ja plans to change history to save Count and prevent guild conflict.

events: Sword Saint confronts Kim Gong-ja in alley
Crusader and pharmacist intervene
Crusader reveals Sword Saint's backstory: daughter killed by murderer
Sword Saint backs down
Kim Gong-ja challenges Sword Saint to test of prophecy
Kim Gong-ja commits suicide multiple times to prove he's prophet
Sword Saint agrees to follow Kim Gong-ja for 5 days
deaths: Kim Gong-ja cuts his own throat multiple times to prove prophecy
Sword Saint's daughter mentioned as killed by serial killer
loops: Kim Gong-ja commits suicide repeatedly to return 24 hours
Uses future knowledge to predict Sword Saint's test
Proves prophecy by knowing Sword Saint's finger count test
cause_effect: Kim Gong-ja's repeated suicides prove he's prophet to Sword Saint
Crusader's innocence stops Sword Saint's violence
5-day agreement prevents immediate conflict on 12th floor
Pharmacist's kindness also affects Sword Saint
notes: Sword Saint reveals his real name: Marcus Calenberry. Kim Gong-ja's willingness to die repeatedly shows his commitment. Crusader is key to stopping Sword Saint.

events: Kim Gong-ja returns to 11th floor with Sword Saint watching
Shares minimap with Witch for efficient boss kill
11th floor cleared in under an hour with minimal casualties
Kim Gong-ja ranks #1, Witch #2
Kim Gong-ja asks guild masters to wait 5 days on 12th floor
Claims he'll clear to 20th floor in 5 days
deaths: Boss monster killed instantly
Under 50 hunters die (much less than previous timeline)
loops: Kim Gong-ja uses future knowledge to optimize 11th floor clear
Prevents guild conflict by asking them to wait 5 days
cause_effect: Sharing information reduces casualties dramatically
Sword Saint's presence prevents Heretic Questioner's violence
Kim Gong-ja's 5-day promise prevents reward selection conflict
Witch is ecstatic about low casualties
notes: Witch cries from happiness about low death count. Kim Gong-ja's reputation grows. Sword Saint follows Kim Gong-ja as promised.

events: Kim Gong-ja recalls goddess's words about 'test of faith'
Kim Gong-ja rejects all 12th floor rewards again
Devil King manifests early, furious at Kim Gong-ja
Kim Gong-ja attacks Devil King before quest officially begins
Devil King is confused by Kim Gong-ja's strategy
Kim Gong-ja declares he'll kill Devil King before quest starts
loops: Kim Gong-ja returns to past with knowledge of Devil King's patterns
Plans to kill Devil King in paused world before quest triggers
cause_effect: Rejecting rewards keeps quest from starting
Devil King manifests anyway due to Kim Gong-ja's provocation
Fighting in paused world means no NPCs will die
Kim Gong-ja's strategy aims for zero casualties
notes: Kim Gong-ja realizes he can exploit game mechanics by rejecting rewards. 'A warrior fights alone' - Kim Gong-ja's philosophy. Devil King is angered by unexpected player behavior.

events: Kim Gong-ja dies repeatedly fighting Devil King alone
Marks each death on his hand with permanent marker
Learns Devil King's attack patterns through deaths
Bae Hu-ryeong coaches sword techniques during loops
Kim Gong-ja's sword skills improve dramatically
Devil King asks why Kim Gong-ja smiles while dying
deaths: Kim Gong-ja dies 100+ times fighting Devil King
Each death marks progress on his hand
loops: Kim Gong-ja dies and returns 24 hours before each time
Accumulates combat experience across hundreds of deaths
cause_effect: Each death teaches Kim Gong-ja Devil King's patterns
Bae Hu-ryeong's coaching improves sword skills
Kim Gong-ja's 'lives' are longer than Devil King's history
Accumulated experience makes Kim Gong-ja stronger each loop
notes: Hundred days of fighting in paused time. Kim Gong-ja's determination to save everyone drives him. Witch notices his hands are covered in marks.

events: Kim Gong-ja uses Hundred Ghosts Summon (SS)
Reveals he has 4099 deaths worth of skeletons
Skeleton army overwhelms Devil King's forces
Tower gives Kim Gong-ja nickname: 'Death King'
Death King title officially recognized
Devil King shocked by same skill
skills: Hundred Ghosts Summon (SS) - summons those killed as monsters
deaths: Devil King's monsters killed by skeleton army
Kim Gong-ja's previous deaths manifested as skeletons
cause_effect: Kim Gong-ja's 4099 suicides/deaths = 4099 skeleton soldiers
Devil King recognizes his own skill being used against him
Tower acknowledges Kim Gong-ja's unique achievement with title
Death King title reflects his mastery over death
notes: Hundred Ghosts Summon reveals each death counts separately for summon count. Kim Gong-ja's kill count (4093) + Flame Emperor + Devil King = ~4099. Death King becomes his permanent nickname.

events: Devil King retreats to 13th floor
Quest revised for floors 12-20
Hidden quest 'Warrior of the Paused World' created
Kim Gong-ja accepts quest
12th floor stage cleared without quest officially starting
History changes - Devil King's attack erased from timeline
skills: Warrior of the Paused World quest
cause_effect: Devil King's retreat causes historical revision
All floors 12-20 quests revised due to changed history
Kim Gong-ja's choice to fight in paused world creates new timeline
Zero casualties achieved on 12th floor
notes: Devil King becomes weaker as history regresses. Each floor cleared makes Devil King weaker. Kim Gong-ja's strategy of fighting in paused world succeeds.

events: 12th floor history rewritten - no Devil King attack
NPCs don't remember original timeline
General Sarbast is alive and well
Kim Gong-ja celebrates on fortress walls
Kim Gong-ja shouts 'I protected your empire!'
Kim Gong-ja gains recognition as Death King
cause_effect: History revision means no one remembers original suffering
Kim Gong-ja's sacrifice in paused world saved everyone
NPCs don't know what he did but he feels fulfilled
Ranking updated: Death King #1, Witch #2, Sword Saint #3
notes: Kim Gong-ja's emotional moment shouting from fortress. Sword Saint and Witch become his close allies. General Sarbast is confused by Kim Gong-ja's emotional outburst.

events: 13th floor: Devil King is weaker
Devil King manifests in temple
Kim Gong-ja realizes Devil King's level dropped due to history change
Tower acknowledges hidden quest progress
11th-19th floor maps opened
Devil King summons zombie army
locations: 13th floor - temple between east and west continent
cause_effect: History regression makes Devil King weaker on each floor
Devil King's growth/leveling was erased by history change
Kim Gong-ja's earlier victory continues to affect later floors
Tower rewards him with world map for changed history
notes: Devil King's being becomes fainter. Temple was goddess's shield. West side is red (Devil King territory), east is blue (human territory).

events: Kim Gong-ja, Witch, and Sword Saint push Devil King back floor by floor
13th-19th floors: zombie army, elf army, mermaid queen, wyvern, giants
Devil King retreats each time, getting weaker
97th death when reaching 19th floor
Devil King's true eyes revealed - bloodshot
Kim Gong-ja says 'My time is longer than your history'
locations: Various locations: temple, fairy forest, waterfall, volcano, small country
skills: Hundred Ghosts Summon used again after 1 week cooldown
deaths: Kim Gong-ja dies 97 times total by 19th floor
Many monster armies destroyed
loops: Kim Gong-ja dies and returns 24 hours before
Re-fights each floor with improved tactics
cause_effect: Devil King gets weaker each retreat due to history regression
Kim Gong-ja's deaths make him stronger each time
Teamwork with Witch and Sword Saint improves
Devil King's true form starts showing through wastewater
notes: Bae Hu-ryeong bets Kim Gong-ja will die under 100 times. Kim Gong-ja wins bet. Devil King's origin as Estelle becomes more apparent.
